message: test: move fix prompt coverage to typescript

files.patch:
@@ -47,11 +47,11 @@
     "repair:publish-result": "node dist/repair/publish-result.js",
     "repair:review-results": "node dist/repair/review-results.js",
     "repair:message-samples": "node dist/repair/render-message-samples.js",
-    "test": "pnpm run build:all && node --test test/*.test.mjs test/repair/*.test.mjs",
+    "test": "pnpm run build:all && node --test test/*.test.mjs test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js",
     "test:unit": "node --test test/*.test.mjs",
-    "test:repair": "pnpm run build:repair && node --test test/repair/*.test.mjs",
+    "test:repair": "pnpm run build:repair && node --test test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js",
     "check:active-surface": "node scripts/check-active-surface.mjs",
-    "lint": "oxlint src --tsconfig tsconfig.json",
+    "lint": "oxlint src --tsconfig tsconfig.json && oxlint src/repair --tsconfig tsconfig.repair.json",
     "format": "oxfmt --write src test package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.repair.json .oxfmtrc.json schema .github/workflows",
     "format:check": "oxfmt --check src test package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.repair.json .oxfmtrc.json schema .github/workflows",
     "oxformat": "pnpm run format",
